title: MARA Reports June 2025 Bitcoin Production and Issues Mid-Year Outlook
text: Marathon Digital released mid-year 2025 guidance and Bitcoin production metrics showing strong operational momentum. Mid-Year Outlook: MARA issued updated guidance for achieving 75 exahash by end of 2025 based on strong first-half execution. The company demonstrated confidence in its 2025 hash rate expansion targets. Bitcoin Production: June 2025 Bitcoin production metrics showed the company maintaining strong mining output while simultaneously pursuing strategic partnerships and acquisitions. Hash Rate Progress: With 1.7 gigawatts of captive capacity operational and a growth pipeline exceeding 3 GW of low-cost power opportunities, MARA demonstrated substantial capacity for near-term hash rate expansion. Strategic Initiatives: The mid-year outlook reflected progress on multiple fronts including advancing the Starwood partnership, integrating Exaion, and planning the Long Ridge Energy buildout. Capital Allocation: MARA's approach to capital allocation showed focus on both organic expansion of mining capacity and strategic investments in AI infrastructure platforms. 2025 Targets: The company reiterated its confidence in achieving 75 EH/s by year-end 2025, representing over 40% growth from 2024's 53.2 EH/s baseline.
